payload:
fmpl-tui crate created with ratatui TUI scaffold

Implementation:
- Three-panel layout (Research, Planning, Execution views)
- FMPL code editor with real-time input
- Execution output panel
- FMPL VM wired for code execution
- crossterm event handling

Test Results:
- All 143 core tests pass (no regressions)
- All 8 tool_calling tests pass
- TUI builds successfully

Files:
- fmpl-tui/Cargo.toml
- fmpl-tui/src/main.rs (204 lines)

Next: Multi-line editor, LLM provider switching, context visualization
